title: Terpenoids : Part CII. A New Synthesis of 2-Methyl-5-isopropenylanisole
author: O. P. VlG
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Department of Chemistry, Panjab University, Chandigarh-160014 

  Manuscript received 25 November 1974; accepted 5 February 1975  

 2-Methyl-5-chlorophenol, prepared from 2.methyl-5-chloroaniline, on methylation with di­methylsulphate and potagalant hydroxide, gives 2-methyl-5-chloroanisole (IV). The compound (IV) on reaction with lithium diisopropenyl copper reagent furnishes 2-methyI-5-isopropenyl­anigole.
steps_raw:
Department of Chemistry, Panjab University, Chandigarh-160014 

  Manuscript received 25 November 1974; accepted 5 February 1975  

 2-Methyl-5-chlorophenol, prepared from 2.methyl-5-chloroaniline, on methylation with di­methylsulphate and potagalant hydroxide, gives 2-methyl-5-chloroanisole (IV). The compound (IV) on reaction with lithium diisopropenyl copper reagent furnishes 2-methyI-5-isopropenyl­anigole.
